creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
As the route cause is devel/arc I changed the summary.

The problematic file is /usr/local/bin/arc, it's been like this ever since the port came into existence/I took over maintainership.

The obvious solution would be to rename "arc" to "arcanist" or another unique name. Since this will affect https://wiki.freebsd.org/CodeReview I added bapt and eadler to the Cc list to check if they prefer a different solution (like placing arc in a different/lower priority path).
